76099.subject: 🤖 Nvidia built an AI model for robots
76099.body:
----------
######                  [Collaborate with us](https://utm.genai.works/r/he2t9cz)


--------------------
View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/8776fa6e-e2d0-4aec-9648-1bed6de3a659/GenAI_Daily_Banner.jpg?t=1778687445)
Caption: 


----------

----------
**Welcome back!** Nvidia launched Cosmos 3 Edge, a model that helps robots see and move, and got 10 big Japanese companies on board. Publishers sued Google, saying Gemini was trained on their books, with an internal Google memo reportedly warning of up to $100 billion in fines. OpenAI's $230 keypad is almost sold out, and Waze added Gemini voice search.

**In today's Generative AI Newsletter:**

* **Nvidia**: What can Cosmos 3 Edge actually do?

* **Courts**: Why is Google being sued over Gemini?

* **OpenAI**: How to keep an eye all your AI agents?

* **Waze**: Who can now boss Waze around by voice?


----------



----------
## [Nvidia built an AI model for robots](https://www.cnbc.com/2026/07/16/nvidia-reveals-new-ai-model-and-expands-japans-physical-ai-ecosystem.html)

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/f38f926a-cc1b-428e-bf1c-c6bf7b2fcdb0/Beehiiv_04-_Jul_17.png?t=1784276645)
Caption: 

On July 15 in Tokyo, CEO Jensen Huang unveiled Cosmos 3 Edge, a model built for robots and vision agents. It is a world model, so it learns to perceive and move through physical space in real time, from more kinds of input than a language model.

It runs on-device, on Nvidia's Jetson Thor boards, so a robot can reason without a round trip to the cloud. It joins the Cosmos 3 family of open world models.

Huang also got Japan behind it. Ten big manufacturers, including Fujitsu, Hitachi, Sony and Yaskawa, plan to build on Cosmos. The next day, Nvidia and a company called Noetra went bigger, announcing a factory they will build with 27,500 Rubin GPUs to train open models for robots and digital twins.

This is Nvidia widening its moat past chips. If robots, factories and cars standardize on Cosmos, Nvidia owns the model layer of the physical world too.

Huang called the physical world "the next frontier of AI." Japan, where factories outnumber the workers to run them, is the proving ground.


----------



----------
## [Google and Nvidia work with this AI distribution company, and here is your chance to own it](https://utm.genai.works/r/s1aqzmc)

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/1ef4fdf1-4975-4ce4-8306-7e99bac695fa/image.png?t=1784279620)
Caption: 

With hundreds of investors on board, GenAI Works is building the go-to-market layer of the AI economy, the distribution every AI product needs to reach real buyers.

All eyes are on AI. 

Anthropic filed to go public, SpaceX paid $60

76098.subject: How to Build a Second Brain with Claude Fable 5 🧠
76098.body:
View this post on the web at https://linas.substack.com/p/how-to-build-a-second-brain-with-claude-fable-5

👋 Hey, Linas here! Every day, I break down 3 stories shaping the future of FinTech & Artificial Intelligence - plus the money movements and trends worth tracking. First time here? 397k+ FinTech and AI leaders get this daily. Join them:
The smartest model on the market still often ships average work all day for one reason and one reason only: it knows nothing about you. No context on your business, your audience, your clients, or your past decisions, so it guesses, and the guesses are generic.
But once you point that same model at a knowledge base you own, it becomes a different machine: code that follows your architecture, content that sounds like you, briefs aimed at your actual customers, research that stands on sources you already checked. Same model, but a completely different league.
That knowledge base is a second brain 🧠, and in 2026, the term means something specific. It’s not a note-taking method. It’s a folder of plain markdown files on your own disk that the model reads, writes, links, and maintains largely on its own. You drop in sources; the agent compiles them into an interconnected wiki, cites where every claim came from, and gets measurably smarter with every file it gains. Anthropic’s Andrej Karpathy [ https://substack.com/redirect/0ed7e9e6-4511-466c-80b7-859c1e1de3e4?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ] formalized the pattern in his April 2026 “LLM Wiki” gist, which inverted the usual approach: the second brain should not be written by you; it should be written by the AI model.
The gap is easily measurable. In accounting workflows, a model working without a client’s history achieves around 70% accuracy. But once you give it that client’s transaction history, it starts at 85% and climbs past 90%. Importantly, nothing about the model changed; the knowledge did. Which means that a mid-tier model with a well-built voice profile produces far more recognizable writing than Fable 5 with no profile at all. Simply put, the files carry more of the result than the model tier does.
Claude Fable 5 [ https://substack.com/redirect/a91f5c63-0497-4840-b5e7-d0d7a287be74?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ] is the first model that demonstrably rewards this setup harder than anything before it.
Why Claude Fable 5 Changes the Math
Fable 5 launched on June 9, 2026 as Anthropic’s first public Mythos-class model [ https://substack.com/redirect/186308c1-5699-4826-abe9-e3fcdf7dc6b5?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ], positioned above Claude Opus 4.8 [ https://substack.com/redirect/2a0997e9-bde8-4d5f-a76d-ac8a959d1733?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ] and built for long-horizon autonomous work. It is included in paid Claude plans for now: Pro, Max, Team, and premium Enterprise seats can spend up to 50% of their wee
